description: Developed internal applications using Microsoft Power Platform. Supported process automation and operational improvements across quality and food safety workflows.

Developed a web-based system for managing academic events including registration, enrollment, and capacity control. Implemented modules for users, events, and administrative dashboard using MVC architecture.
Delivered a 150-hour Basic SQL course to 20+ students covering database fundamentals, query development, and hands-on exercises in data retrieval and troubleshooting.
